description: If you want a bag that's funky, stylish, super cool and comfortable to carry around all day, check out this black backpack from nike. Carry it to college or on a casual day out with your friends. A stunningly good looking bag, with loads of space, it'll become your best buddy in no time. Be prepared to be swept off your feet by this awesome backpack!Height: 47 cmWidth: 29 cmDepth: 14 cmMade of 100% 600D polyester for enhanced durability and styleNylon lining for increased durabilityOne main zipped compartment to accommodate all your essentials with a mesh zipped pocketOne zipped pocket on the front with a mesh organiser sleevenike swoosh appliquéd on the frontPadded, adjustable shoulder straps that distribute weight evenly and protect the shoulders and back from injuriesErgonomic design to Fit along the torso comfortablyNike Swoosh in stitch detailing on the strapHaul loop for handling easeBranded zips and sliders for easy useCareRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
